note: Two unrelated UI additions. (1) Explorer top nav: new red WALLET link added after GITHUB so the SOST wallet is one click from the explorer. (2) Web wallet sidebar: new amber Switch Wallet button under End Session. End Session keeps its existing lock+come-back-with-password behaviour; Switch Wallet forgets the cached wallet from THIS browser and reloads the welcome screen so a different wallet can be imported. Two confirm dialogs guard against accidental loss; backup reminder explicit. Auto-reload on open tabs within ~60 s; Ctrl+Shift+R if cached.
